$orderId..write: (auth != null && auth.token.firebase.sign_in_provider == 'password') || (!data.exists() && newData.child('id').val() == $orderId && newData.hasChildren(['id','ts','name','phone','email','date','delivery','address','total','status']) && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 80 && newData.child('phone').isString() && newData.child('phone').val().length <= 30 && newData.child('email').isString() && newData.child('email').val().length <= 120 && newData.child('date').isString() && newData.child('delivery').val().matches(/^(宅配|面交)$/) && newData.child('address').isString() && newData.child('address').val().length <= 200 && newData.child('total').isNumber() && newData.child('total').val() >= 0 && newData.child('total').val() <= 20000 && newData.child('status').val() == 'pending')
